name: ares-car-rental
description: Ares Car Rental - Full Stack Application

scripts.preinstall:
echo '
❌ Do not run bun install at root!
💡 Use: bun run deps
' && exit 1
scripts.deps: cd scripts/setup && bun install && cd ../../frontend && bun install
scripts.lint:all: bun run --cwd frontend lint && bun run --cwd scripts/setup lint
scripts.typecheck:all: bun run --cwd frontend tsgo && bun run --cwd scripts/setup tsgo

author: Ares Team
